title: Tokenized Deposits Find First Use Cases in Treasury and B2B Payments
message_html: Tokenized Deposits Find First Use Cases in Treasury and B2B Payments ...
snippet: The announcement that major U.S. banks will launch a tokenized deposit network in 2027 grabbed headlines last week, where the initiative has been seen as the banking industry’s response to stablecoins. But when executives gathered for The Clearing House’s media day days later, the discussion touched
